disclaimer: Personal signal tracker. Counts from WHO DON and news reports - verify at primary sources before citing.

regions.name: Ushuaia, Argentina
regions.notes: Ship departure April 1. Dutch couple likely exposed here during birdwatching trip. Rodent trapping underway.

regions.name: Saint Helena
regions.notes: Case 1 (Dutch man, 70) died April 11. ~40 passengers disembarked April 24, all contact traced.

regions.name: Ascension Island
regions.notes: British passenger evacuated April 27, flown to Johannesburg ICU.

regions.name: Cape Verde (MV Hondius)
regions.notes: Ship anchored off Praia May 3-7. German woman died May 2. Now heading to Tenerife, arriving May 9.

regions.name: Johannesburg, South Africa
regions.notes: Dutch woman died April 26 (PCR confirmed). British national in ICU improving. Contact tracing for April 25 flight passengers.

regions.name: Netherlands
regions.notes: 3 patients airlifted May 5 including ship doctor. KLM flight attendant admitted Amsterdam UMC May 7 with suspected infection.

regions.name: Zurich, Switzerland
regions.notes: Male passenger confirmed Andes strain at University Hospital Zurich.

regions.name: France
regions.notes: French national monitored as contact - shared Airlink flight with Case 2.

regions.name: Singapore
regions.notes: 2 residents (67 and 65) isolated in govt facility. Both on April 25 Johannesburg flight with confirmed case. One has runny nose, tests pending.

regions.name: Arizona, USA
regions.notes: 1 returning MV Hondius passenger under monitoring. Currently healthy per CDC.

regions.name: Georgia, USA
regions.notes: Georgia DPH confirmed 2 residents monitoring after disembarking MV Hondius. Both in good health, no signs of infection.

regions.name: California, USA
regions.notes: California DPH coordinating with local officials to monitor returning MV Hondius travelers. No illness reported.

regions.name: Tenerife, Spain
regions.notes: Ship arriving Granadilla port May 9. Spain reversed ban. 146 passengers from 23 nationalities to disembark.
